text: Welcome to 3rd grade! Please review the class rules and supply list posted in Materials. We are going to have a wonderful year together!
Picture Day is this Thursday, September 11! Please wear your best smile. Order forms went home in Friday folders last week.
Our class field trip to the Gulf Coast Nature Center is on October 14. Permission slips are due by October 7. We will need 4 parent chaperones -- please sign up on the form in Materials!

Reading log reminder: students should be reading at least 20 minutes every night. Please sign and return the monthly reading log by the last Friday of each month. Great job to everyone who turned in October logs on time!

Parent-Teacher Conference sign-ups are now open! Please use the link in Materials to select your preferred time slot. Conferences are November 18-19. I look forward to sharing your child progress with you.
Library book return reminder: all library books are due back this Friday, December 12, before winter break. Please check backpacks and around the house!
Spring Concert is May 15 at 6:30 PM in the school auditorium. Our class will perform two songs. Students should wear their blue Gulfport Elementary t-shirts. Doors open at 6:00 PM.
End-of-Year Celebration Party is Friday June 5! We will have games, snacks, and a slideshow of our year together. Please see the sign-up sheet in Materials if you can bring a dish to share.
Welcome to Art class! This year we will explore drawing, painting, collage, and more. Please bring a smock or an old shirt to keep in your cubby for art days.
Reminder: we need craft supplies for our Autumn Leaf Collage project next week! Please send in any fall-colored tissue paper, dried leaves, or fabric scraps you have at home. Thank you so much!

Art Show is coming up on April 24! Every student will have artwork displayed in the hallway gallery. Family members are invited to view the gallery from 5:30-7:00 PM. We are so proud of all our young artists!
Welcome to Kindergarten! We are so excited to meet our new learners. Please label all belongings with your child name. Bring a water bottle and a healthy snack each day.
Show-and-Tell this Friday! Students may bring one small item from home that starts with the letter S. Please place items in a brown bag and write the letter S on the outside.
Kindergarten Thanksgiving Feast is November 20! We will eat lunch together as a class and share what we are thankful for. Students may bring a traditional family dish to share.

Our Kindergarten Spring Garden project starts next Monday! Students will plant sunflower seeds and keep a growing journal. We need empty egg cartons and small shovels -- please send these in by Friday if you can.
Kindergarten Moving Up Ceremony is June 9 at 10:00 AM in the school gym! All family members are welcome. Students should arrive by 9:45 AM. Light refreshments will be served after the ceremony.
We have been learning about measurement this week! Please help your child practice at home by measuring household objects with a ruler. Great work on our math assessments — scores go home Friday.

Volunteer appreciation shout-out! Thank you to all the parents who helped with our February Centers Day. We had so much fun and the kids loved it. More volunteer opportunities coming in March — watch for the sign-up sheet!

Number recognition practice: we are working on numbers 1-20 this month! Please use the number flash cards in Materials to practice at home. Students who master all 20 by Friday will earn a special sticker certificate!

Spring Art project is underway! Third graders are creating watercolor landscapes inspired by the Gulf Coast. We need clean plastic lids (yogurt, sour cream, any size) to use as paint palettes. Bring them in by next Wednesday. Thank you!
